earth-style-sweet-potato-sorrels-telecul.name: Earth-style Sweet Potato Sorrels
earth-style-sweet-potato-sorrels-telecul.original_name: Azevias de batata-doce à moda da terra
instructions: Prepare the filling: peel the potatoes, cut them into pieces and bake them in water with cinnamon stick and salt. Remove from the fire, discard the cinnamon, drain the potatoes and reduce the mashed potatoes. Mix the egg, yolk, butter, milk, sugar and lemon zest, stirring between each addition. Take it back to the fire, until it rises boiling, withdraw and reserve.

Prepare the dough: melt the lard and butter. Wipe the flour into a bowl, add a pinch of salt and form a hole in the middle. Put the eggs in it and then the melted fats and mix it with the flour. Add the brandy and knead well. Form a ball and tape with adherent film. Let the dough rest for 30 minutes in the fridge.

After this time, extend the mass on a smooth and floury surface until it is very thin. Distribute portions of filling, with the help of a teaspoon, and tape with the dough. Use a rim or cutter (about 9 cm in diameter) to cut the mistletoe into half-moons, as if they were rissols. Press your extremities tight.

Fry the sourberries in hot oil until they get color on both sides. Remove with a skimmer and let it run on absorbent paper. Mix some sugar with cinnamon powder, sprinkle the sourberries and serve them warm or cold.

easter-nest-cake-teleculinaria.name: Easter Nest Cake

ingredients.item: 150 g de fios de ovos de compra

instructions: Light a pot with the vanilla milk and sugar and let it simmer. In a bowl, beat the yolks with sugar until a clear mixture becomes, add the masena flour and then the milk, in yarn and always stirring. Lay this mixture on the pot and bring it to the fire, always stirring until boiling and get a smooth cream. Then lie down in a bowl, cover with sticky film and let it cool.

Start the oven at 180oC, bar a shape with margarine and sprinkle it with flour. Mix sugar with flour. In a large bowl, beat the clears in a very firm castle, add the mixture of sugar and stir very well. Then add the yolks, the starch previously mixed with the yeast and the lemon scrape and mix well.

Pour the previous preparation in the form, put it in the oven for 40 minutes, check the cooking with a toothpick, remove, let it cool down a little, unshape and let it cool completely. Cut the cake in half so as to get two slices, bar the bottom with a bit of the filling cream, replace the top slice and bar the whole cake with the rest of the cream. Then cover with the egg threads and serve decorated with almonds or other decoration to taste.

economical-seafood-rice-teleculinaria.name: Economical Seafood Rice
instructions: Peel, wash and lick garlic teeth. Get the peppers, reject pevides and white skins and cut into cubes. Get the tomato and cut it into cubes.

In a pot with abundant water boils the seafood cream. In a pot light the oil with garlic teeth and the blond leaf and let it shine. Add the peppers and tomato and let it saute a little. Refresh with the white wine.
Add the tomato pulp, spicy and seafood cream and rice, twice the amount, that is, the container you use to measure the rice, should fill twice to measure the seafood cream.
Let it boil, add the clam cocktail and rectify the salt and stir for about 7 minutes or until the rice is cooked. Remove and serve decorated to taste.

egg-pie-argiro.name: Egg Pie
instructions: We start by mixing milk with feta cheese, eggs and salt and pepper.
Brush a baking pan with olive oil and spread two sets, oil them each individually and add a part of the filling.
Repeat the processes with the leaves and filling until it is finished.
Brush the last left with olive oil and save the surface of the pie.
Bake in a preheated oven at 180°C for about 1 hour until well golden.
Learn all my secrets to Always make your pies successful and delicious.

eggless-lime-custards-with-lychees.name: Eggless Lime Custards With Lychees

ingredients.prep: zest removed in wide strips, plus finely grated zest for serving

instructions: Bring wide strips of lime zest, salt, ½ cup sugar, and 2 cups cream to a boil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat.
Reduce heat and simmer, swirling pan occasionally and being careful not to let mixture boil over, until cream is slightly thickened, about 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and stir in lime juice.
Strain mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a large measuring glass; divide among 4 small glasses, bowls, or 8-oz. ramekins.
Chill until custards are no longer warm, about 30 minutes, then cover with plastic wrap and continue to chill until set, at least 2 hours.
Just before serving, whisk remaining ½ cup cream in a small bowl to soft peaks; whisk in remaining 1 Tbsp. sugar.
Top each custard with dollops of cream, a few lychees (you may have a few left over), and some finely grated lime zest.

eggs-over.name: Eggs Over

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Melt butter in an 8-inch nonstick pan over medium heat. Once butter is melted, crack eggs into the pan. Tilt pan to evenly distribute eggs. Cook until whites are no longer translucent, 1 to 2 minutes. Flip eggs by pushing the pan away from you and slightly tossing eggs up and over. Move pan upwards to catch eggs.
Cook on second side until desired doneness, 30 to 45 seconds. Season with salt and pepper.

eggy-potato-salad-with-pickles.name: Eggy Potato Salad With Pickles

ingredients.item: Sweet pickle juice from jar plus 8–10 sweet-pickle chips
Freshly ground black pepper plus more

instructions: Place potatoes in a large pot. Add water to cover by 2", season with salt, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium and cook until potatoes are tender when pierced with a knife, 20–30 minutes. Drain. Place potatoes in a large bowl and let cool slightly.
Meanwhile, whisk mayonnaise, pickle juice, Dijon mustard, sugar, 1/4 tsp. pepper, and 1 1/4 tsp. salt in a small bowl for dressing.
Using a large wooden spoon, coarsely smash potatoes, leaving some larger pieces mixed with some well-mashed pieces.

Add dressing and egg yolks to potatoes and toss to coat, coarsely smashing egg yolks. Add onion and parsley; gently mix to incorporate. Season to taste with more salt and pepper, if desired. DO AHEAD: Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Divide potato salad among small paper cups or bowls; dust with paprika. Top each serving with a pickle chip.
